title: Elon Musk Endorses Message Calling To Impeach Trump And Replace Him With JD Vance
description: Elon Musk endorsed a message calling for the impeachment of Donald Trump and for his replacement to be Vice President JD Vance
bodyText: Billionaire Elon Musk endorsed on Thursday a message calling for the impeachment of President Donald Trump and for him to be replaced by Vice President JD Vance, as the feud between the once-allies escalates quickly and publicly. "President vs Elon. Who wins? My money's on Elon. Trump should be impeached and JD Vance should replace him," reads the post to which Musk replied "Yes." Yes https://t.co/rqRsX8B4Hg It is the latest development in a feud that is developing frantically on social media and before the world's eyes. It began as Musk escalated his opposition to Trump's "big, beautiful" tax cuts and spending bill, which prompted a rebuttal by Trump. The two went scorched earth on Thursday, with Musk claiming that without him "Trump would have lost the election, Dems would control the House and the Republicans would be 51-49 in the Senate." He then suggested creating a new political party "that actually represents the 80% in the middle." Trump replied to Musk's concerns about the bill increasing the deficit by saying that the "easiest way to save money in our Budget, Billions and Billions of Dollars, is to terminate Elon's Governmental Subsidies and Contracts. I was always surprised that Biden didn't do it!" "Elon was 'wearing thin,' I asked him to leave, I took away his EV Mandate that forced everyone to buy Electric Cars that nobody else wanted (that he knew for months I was going to do!), and he just went CRAZY!" Trump added. Musk then accused Trump of being in the "Epstein Files" and, in response to Trump's publications, said "SpaceX will begin decommissioning its Dragon spacecraft immediately." © 2025 Latin Times.
